---
title: "Your Name"
subtitle: "Machine Vision • Robotics • Agricultural Automation"
author: "Your Name, PhD"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: 
      - cosmo
      - custom.scss
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 800px
      margin-width: 250px
    navbar:
      background: primary
      search: true
      left:
        - text: "Home"
          href: index.qmd
        - text: "Research"
          href: research.qmd
        - text: "Publications"
          href: publications.qmd
        - text: "Code"
          href: code.qmd
      right:
        - icon: github
          href: https://github.com/yourusername
        - icon: arxiv
          href: https://arxiv.org/a/yourid
---

# Welcome

I develop high-performance machine vision and robotics systems for agricultural product inspection and automation (rice, garlic, coffee, etc.).

**Core expertise:**
- 6DoF pose estimation
- Synthetic data generation (Isaac Sim + Replicator)
- Real-time OpenCV + CUDA pipelines (C++26 / C#)
- Hybrid rule-based + deep learning inspection
- ROS 2 + Isaac Sim integration

Currently focused on building reliable agent-driven development workflows and open research via Quarto + GitHub.

---

## Latest

- [New preprint on garlic 6DoF pose estimation using synthetic data](publications.qmd) — March 2026
- [Open-source C++26 vision library for RTX 4080 Super](code.qmd)

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Looking for collaboration or licensing?

I selectively open-source core algorithms and sell production-ready libraries + datasets via Gumroad.
:::
